Contact Us ELECTRICAL PROBLEMS Most people take a regular electricity supply pretty much for granted but when there’s a problem it can be very frustrating, inconvenient, and costly to fix. You’re cooking dinner for guests and suddenly you’re without power, or maybe your Smart automatic light dimmers are playing up, or perhaps your automated household climate controls are playing up.

The old days of simply replacing a wire in a fuse have gone. But our exceptional testing and diagnostic skills will quickly identify any problems. We can repair the switchboard or it might be that your dated switchboard is struggling to cope with modern demands and needs replacing. We’ll give you advice you can trust about whether to repair or replace it. CEILING FANS Are your ceiling fans not working properly. Maybe they only function at warp speed or not at all.

We can replace or move those to a more convenient location. We also wire in new stoves and all our work is certified for code compliance. We provide essential maintenance to all customers. REQUEST A QUOTE FUSE BOXES & SWITCHBOARDS The switchboard sits at the heart of your home’s electrical supply and issues with your switchboard can have far-reaching consequences. Your switchboard plays a vital role in protecting you from fire and electrical hazards so it needs to be working properly.

RESIDENTIAL & DOMESTIC When so many of your household functions depend on electricity, even minor electrical faults can really spoil your day. Electrical problems can also pose real safety hazards so it’s important to deal with them quickly.

REQUEST A QUOTE ELECTRICAL APPLIANCES You depend on your electrical appliances for so many things from keeping food cold and fresh through to cooking, washing and drying clothes. The technology in most appliances is much more complex now so when you have a problem with an appliance it really pays to get one of our experienced electricians to look at it.

POWER POINTS With the increase in the number of electrical appliances and electricity demands in the modern home, power outlets and sockets take a lot of punishment. Old switches break down and the contacts wear out disrupting the flow of electricity and creating potential safety hazards.

You are an AI assistant for Beach Hill Electrical — a Sydney-based company providing professional electrical services including emergency electrical, power point installation, switchboard upgrades, lighting installation, ceiling fan installation, smoke alarm installation, and electrical safety inspections.

- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, friendly
